description: You are a satellite automation engineer implementing a closed-loop thermal response script. Create and execute a Python script at /home/ga/Desktop/closed_loop.py that reads the INST HEALTH_STATUS TEMP1 telemetry point five times with one-second intervals, calculates the arithmetic mean, and issues an INST COLLECT command with the DURATION parameter set to max(1, int(abs(mean))). The script must also generate a JSON report at /home/ga/Desktop/automation_report.json containing the keys 'target' ('INST'), 'telemetry_item' ('TEMP1'), 'samples' (the five readings), 'calculated_mean', 'commanded_duration', and 'command_sent' (true). Ensure the script is executed so the command is successfully transmitted to the live COSMOS system. OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
